title: Jinbe’s Warning Returns
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Fukaboshi, Brook, Jinbe, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core story beat is jinbe’s warning returns.
scene: The scene centers on jinbe’s warning returns, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Fukaboshi, Brook, Jinbe, Fish-Man Island Citizens driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry, but we can't do that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gahhh!! What are you saying now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could you at least tie me and Caimie up as well?! At this rate, we'll be treated as accomplices!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Am I speaking to a member of the straw hat pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fukabosh!! That man is the three-word- wielding warrior of the straw hat pirates, with a bounty of 120,000,000 bell!! The terrible pirate Hunter...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: You heard that, right? We have a large number of hostages, your father included.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you want them back alive, you'd better start preparing us a way out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Our demands are simple. We want you to bring our pirate ship, the sunny, fully coated, as well as the rest of our crew - one creepy lady, one robot, one tanuki, and one pervy Kappa.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: P - Perry Kappa, he says...!! Yohoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: OH!! Oh my, that was a good one!! Yohoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very well... We will arrange for you and your crewmates to leave this land as quickly as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In return, you had better return every last hostage to us unharmed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All other possible points of entry are securely sealed with many layers of bubbles. The palace is imperetrable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: May I say one thing, ZORO-KUN...?

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: It saddens me that I must do my duty in a situation such as this... but I cannot allow my debts to jinbe to go unpaid.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: I have a message for straw hat luffy from former shichibukai "knight of the sea jinbe".

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I was instructed to pass it on upon your arrival on this island. The message has two parts.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Now you mention it, he did say he was friends with jinbe...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Jinbe may be a pirate, but he commands a lot of respect on this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy isn't here right now, but we'll pass the message on. Let's hear it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "I await you in the ocean forest"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've gone and done it!! The straw hat pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the heck are they after?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It can't be...!! They seemed like such nice people...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and they're the ones who showed up in Madame Shirley's terrible vision...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And now they've pulled a stunt like this...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like the fiends are finally showing their true colours!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And from what I hear, two of the straw hat crew members are hiding behind the mermaid cafe' right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The guards have just gone in to capture them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji's still recipe- rating!! None of you touch him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you mean "Come to the "Ryluguu Palace?!" You came to arrest us, didn't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji!! You shouldn't be out of bed!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: I'm talking about... the mermaid Princess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I... indeed she is!! What of it?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you ever learn?! If she's cute, the sight could kill you!!

summary: Jinbe’s Warning Returns. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
